title: glow-lab-vitamin-c-launch
brief: Glow Lab is a premium organic skincare brand launching their hero product: a daily Vitamin C serum at $48. Target audience is health-conscious women aged 25-40 who value clean beauty, visible results, and self-care rituals. Visual tone: warm, minimal, editorial luxury with soft natural lighting.
script: Your morning routine is missing one thing. Glow Lab's Vitamin C serum is cold-pressed from organic botanicals, designed to brighten, protect, and transform your skin in just fourteen days. One drop, every morning, before sunscreen. Real ingredients. Real results. Glow Lab. Radiance you can see.

clips.prompt: Extreme close-up of a single golden serum drop falling in slow motion onto a fingertip, warm soft backlight creating a glowing halo effect, shallow depth of field, luxury minimal aesthetic, amber and cream tones

Elegant frosted glass vitamin C serum bottle on a white marble surface surrounded by fresh orange slices and rosemary sprigs, soft diffused overhead natural light, editorial product photography, clean warm color palette

Young woman gently applying serum to her cheek in a bright bathroom, golden hour side light streaming through a window creating warm rim glow on her skin, cinematic shallow focus, dewy natural skin texture, calm morning ritual mood

Split-screen style before and after showing dull skin transitioning to radiant glowing skin, soft clinical lighting gradually warming to golden tones, beauty photography macro detail, luminous skin texture, hopeful uplifting atmosphere

cta.subtext: See results in 14 days or your money back
